positive: A whimsical and sophisticated neon cityscape at dusk, viewed through a circular Venetian window opening. The main subject is a stylized, minimalist geometric mountain range silhouetted against the vibrant grid of the city lights. The palette should focus on deep indigo, electric cyan, magenta, and vibrant teal, utilizing high contrast for a striking visual impact. The composition must be central and symmetrical, designed to repeat cleanly across fabric. Style: Synthwave Art meets Art Deco geometry. Lighting: Strong backlighting from the neon signs and distant city glow. Focus on clean, crisp lines and deep, saturated colors suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, watermark, text, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, cluttered, photographic, realism, logos, copyrighted, character names
